---
name: Domain Skill Request
about: Request support for a new website or service
title: "[skill] "
labels: skill, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Service**: [e.g. Salesforce, Notion, Jira]

**What should the agent be able to do?**
Describe the tasks you want automated.

**Auth type** (if known):
- [ ] Username/password
- [ ] SSO (Okta, Microsoft, Google, etc.)
- [ ] MFA required
- [ ] CAPTCHA on login
- [ ] Cloudflare/anti-bot protection

**API availability** (if known):
- [ ] REST API available
- [ ] Internal/undocumented API
- [ ] UI-only (browser automation required)

**Additional context**
Links to docs, common workflows, etc.
